text:
Feyenoord Rotterdam, Dutch football club based in Rotterdam, also known as Feyenoord, FeyenoordRotterdam. Attributes include: 
- named after: "Feijenoord"
- Commons category: "Feyenoord"
- instance of: "association football club"
- home venue: "De Kuip"
- league or competition: "Eredivisie (start time: 1956)"
- head coach: "Robin van Persie (start time: 23 Feb 2025)"
- sport: "association football"
- country: "Netherlands"
- inception: "19 Jul 1908"
- official name: "Feyenoord Rotterdam (start time: 1978)"
- short name: "Feyenoord"
- location of formation: "Rotterdam"
- headquarters location: "Rotterdam"
- official color: "red",
 "white",
 "black"
- different from: "Feijenoord"
- native label: "Feyenoord"
- fandom: "Het Legioen"
